items.a: MCP connects your AI assistant to your NeoSapien memories. Your AI can search, retrieve and reference everything you have recorded — without copy-pasting or switching apps.
Any AI app that supports the Model Context Protocol works, including Claude Desktop, Cursor and other MCP-compatible assistants.

items.q: Do I need to set it up every time?
items.a: No. Once you add the NeoSapien MCP to your AI app, it stays configured. You only need to restart the app after the initial setup.
Yes. Your memories stay in your NeoSapien account and are only accessed through your own API key. Nothing is shared without your request.

items.q: What if my AI says it cannot find memories?
items.a: Add 'from NeoSapien MCP' to your prompt so the AI queries your memories. If it still fails, restart your AI app so the MCP loads on startup.

items.q: How do I get my API key?
items.a: Open the NeoSapien app and copy your API key from your account settings. Paste it into your AI app's MCP configuration.

items.q: Can I use the same account across multiple AI tools?
items.a: Yes. The same NeoSapien account and API key work across every AI tool you connect, so your memories stay in sync everywhere.
